seo.title: Visual Effects (VFX) – AI VFX Generator | OpenCreator
seo.description: Generate cinematic sci-fi visual effects from images with AI and produce VFX-style shots for concept videos and promos.

hero.title: Visual Effects (VFX)
hero.description: Turn existing shots into sci-fi inspired visual effects moments with AI. Upload a frame and add atmospheric beams, portals, glows, and other VFX elements so you can quickly explore looks for pitches, concepts, and stylized content.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Upload your shots and describe the visual effect you want to add

steps.title: Pick a shot you want to enhance
steps.description: Upload a base image or frame from your film, trailer, or game. This becomes the foundation for your AI-generated VFX shot.

steps.title: Describe the visual effect you imagine
steps.description: Write a short prompt describing the effect—such as energy beams, portals, explosions, holograms, or sci-fi atmospheres—and the mood or color you want.

steps.title: Generate multiple AI VFX variations
steps.description: Run the Visual Effects workflow to create cinematic variations on top of your original frame using AI image and video models.

steps.title: Review, refine, and reuse the workflow
steps.description: Compare different VFX results, tweak your prompts or inputs, then reuse the same setup whenever you need more shots in a similar style.

whoIsFor.title: Built for creators who need fast VFX

items.question: What is the Visual Effects (VFX) template?
items.answer: The Visual Effects (VFX) template is an AI VFX generator workflow that turns images into cinematic sci-fi visual effects shots. It’s useful for concept VFX and quick test shots.

items.question: What inputs does the VFX workflow require?
items.answer: You typically provide a base image or frame plus a description of the effect you want (e.g., energy beam, portal, explosion, hologram). The workflow then generates stylized VFX frames or clips.

items.question: Can I use this for image-to-VFX transformations?
items.answer: Yes. The template is designed for image-to-VFX scenarios where you already have a shot or concept frame and want to add AI-generated effects on top.

items.question: Is it suitable for final production VFX?
items.answer: It’s best suited for concept development, previs, and stylized content. For high-end production shots, you may want to treat the AI output as a reference or plate to refine in traditional VFX tools.

items.question: Can I control intensity and style of the VFX?
items.answer: You can guide intensity, color, and style through your prompts (e.g., subtle glow, over-the-top sci-fi blast). Running multiple variations helps you choose the best look.

items.question: Who should use the AI VFX generator template?
items.answer: Filmmakers, VFX artists, game developers, and content creators who need fast VFX concepts for pitches, prototypes, or social content.

items.question: How are credits consumed in the Visual Effects (VFX) workflow?
items.answer: Credits are consumed per generation based on the underlying image and video models used. Higher resolutions or longer sequences may use more credits than quick concept frames.
